description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and large, rectangular windows on multiple sides. The front facade is distinguished by two tall, arched windows with black railings on the lower level, and a set of matching arched windows above, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entrance is a single dark-colored door with a metallic handle, set beneath a row of wide, horizontal windows. The interior, visible through the windows, includes a staircase, potted plants, and a workspace, suggesting a contemporary urban lifestyle. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light gray color, while the interior walls are painted a muted green. The overall aesthetic is clean and minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large arched windows, a dark entry door, and minimalist light gray and green finishes. The design emphasizes geometric shapes and abundant natural light.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entrance with a dark door, large rectangular windows, and a glimpse of the interior staircase and workspace.
description_view_1: This side view displays a mostly blank wall with a single window and visible interior plants, highlighting the minimalist exterior.
description_view_2: The rear view features two sets of tall, arched windows with black railings, providing a dramatic and elegant appearance.
description_view_3: This side view is mostly solid wall with a small window and visible interior decor, emphasizing privacy and simplicity.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large arched windows and horizontal rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Single dark door with metallic handle, no porch or steps, minimalist and flush with facade
